summary: Tested Personal Best Tracking and Web Push Notifications features. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification shows Personal Bests section with BEST DAY (86), BEST WEEK (186), and TODAY (75) tiles. The 'X to beat' indicator correctly shows '11 to beat'. Service worker /sw-push.js is accessible.

frontend_tests.personal_bests_section_visible: PASSED - BEST DAY, BEST WEEK, TODAY tiles all visible
frontend_tests.daily_scorecard: PASSED - Shows 75 touchpoints, +14 vs yesterday (61), 11-day streak with ON FIRE badge

push_notifications_api: GET /api/push/vapid-key returns non-empty public_key (no auth required)
frontend_ui: Personal Bests section displays 3 tiles: BEST DAY, BEST WEEK, TODAY
TODAY tile shows 'X to beat' when below personal best
Trophy icon (gold) for BEST DAY, Ribbon icon (purple) for BEST WEEK, Flash icon for TODAY
Daily Scorecard shows streak count with 'ON FIRE' badge when streak >= 7
service_worker: /sw-push.js is accessible and returns correct content
Service worker handles push event and notificationclick

context_for_next_testing_agent: Personal Bests and Push Notifications are fully verified. The performance API returns personal_bests object with best_day=86 (Feb 27), best_week=186. Today's count was 75. The frontend correctly shows '11 to beat' (86-75=11). Push registration in browser shows 'permission denied' which is expected in automated tests. VAPID keys are configured in backend/.env and frontend/.env.

mocked_apis.Push notifications: MOCKED in test - actual push requires user permission in browser
